title: Fix deployment issue causing site to be stuck on 'going live' loading screen

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the deployment issue in Version 44 that causes the site to display a 'going live' loading message/spinner indefinitely on mobile devices, preventing the application from loading or initializing properly

quotes: It just keeps saying "going live", but it doesn't
After the latest changes it gave this issue, which makes me believe it's an issue in the code itself
I can only view on mobile now

acceptanceCriteria: The site loads successfully on mobile devices without getting stuck on a loading screen
The React application initializes properly and displays the main interface
All features from Version 44 (kids mode, content filtering, original styling) are accessible on mobile
No JavaScript errors prevent the application from loading
The Internet Computer canister responds correctly to requests on mobile browsers

requirements.text: Add comprehensive error handling and logging to the frontend initialization process in frontend/src/main.tsx and frontend/src/App.tsx to capture and display any errors that prevent the application from loading
acceptanceCriteria: Any initialization errors are caught and logged to the browser console
A user-friendly error message is displayed if the application fails to load
Error messages include specific details about what failed (actor initialization, authentication, routing, etc.)
The error handling does not interfere with normal application loading when no errors occur

requirements.text: Verify that the backend canister in backend/main.mo compiles successfully and deploys without errors, ensuring all query functions and mutations are accessible
acceptanceCriteria: The backend canister compiles without Motoko syntax or type errors
All query functions (getKidFriendlyPosts, getUserPosts, getFavorites, etc.) are callable from the frontend
The backend actor initializes correctly with all mixins (StorageMixin, AuthorizationMixin)
No runtime errors occur during backend initialization

requirements.text: Test the deployed Version 44 on multiple mobile browsers (Safari, Chrome, Firefox) to identify browser-specific issues that may cause the loading problem
acceptanceCriteria: The site is tested on at least Safari (iOS) and Chrome (Android) mobile browsers
Any browser-specific compatibility issues are identified and documented
Polyfills or fallbacks are added for any unsupported browser features
The site loads successfully on all tested mobile browsers

constraints: Must maintain all existing functionality from Version 44 (kids mode, content filtering, favorites, replies)
Must not break the single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo
Must preserve the original logo, header styling, and site appearance that was restored in Version 44
Fix must work specifically on mobile devices as the user can only access the site via mobile
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond fixing the loading issue
Redesigning the user interface or changing existing styling
Implementing desktop-specific fixes (user can only test on mobile)
Reverting to Version 43 or removing Version 44 features
